Code to add a simple Bluesky feed.
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(httr2)
library(purrr)
library(htmltools)

response <- request("https://public.api.bsky.app/xrpc/app.bsky.feed.getAuthorFeed") |>
  req_url_query(actor = "sportecostudent.bsky.social", limit = 20) |>
  req_perform() |>
  resp_body_json()

posts <- response$feed

cards <- map(posts, function(item) {
  text <- item$post$record$text
  date <- substr(item$post$record$createdAt, 1, 10)
  url  <- paste0("https://bsky.app/profile/sportecostudent.bsky.social/post/",
                 basename(item$post$uri))
  likes  <- item$post$likeCount %||% 0
  reposts <- item$post$repostCount %||% 0

  div(class = "bsky-card",
    p(class = "bsky-text", text),
    div(class = "bsky-footer",
      span(class = "bsky-date", date),
      span(class = "bsky-stats",
        span(paste0("♥ ", likes)),
        span(paste0("♻ ", reposts))
      ),
      a(class = "bsky-link", "View on Bluesky", href = url, target = "_blank")
    )
  )
})

tagList(cards)
```
